languages.text: "Отвратительно. В коридорах нечем дышать из-за отребья с нижних палуб. Моя бы воля, я бы лично взашей их отсюда выставил, только время чужое попусту тратят.... Ох! Клятая рана".

traits.locale_text: "Отвратительно. В коридорах нечем дышать из-за отребья с нижних палуб. Моя бы воля, я бы лично взашей их отсюда выставил, только время чужое попусту тратят.... Ох! Клятая рана".

languages.text: "Disgusting. Can't breathe in the corridors because of lower-deck scum. If it was up to me, I'd boot every last one of them out of here, load of time-wasters... Ow! Damn wound."
languages.original_text: "Отвратительно. В коридорах нечем дышать из-за отребья с нижних палуб. Моя бы воля, я бы лично взашей их отсюда выставил, только время чужое попусту тратят.... Ох! Клятая рана".

traits.locale_text: "Disgusting. Can't breathe in the corridors because of lower-deck scum. If it was up to me, I'd boot every last one of them out of here, load of time-wasters... Ow! Damn wound."
"Disgusting. Can't breathe in the corridors because of lower-deck scum. If it was up to me, I'd boot every last one of them out of here, load of time-wasters... Ow! Damn wound."
"Disgusting. Can't breathe in the corridors because of lower-deck scum. If it was up to me, I'd boot every last one of them out of here, load of time-wasters... Ow! Damn wound."

languages.text: 「下層のゴミどもが通路で息ができない。俺が言うなら、この下層のゴミどもを全員追い出す。時間の無駄だ」
languages.original_text: "Disgusting. Can't breathe in the corridors because of lower-deck scum. If it was up to me, I'd boot every last one of them out of here, load of time-wasters... Ow! Damn wound."

languages.text: "İğrenç. Alt güvertenin pislikleri yüzünden koridorlarda nefes alınmıyor. Elimde olsa hepsini buradan atardım, hepsi zaman kaybı... Of! Lanet yara."
languages.original_text: "Disgusting. Can't breathe in the corridors because of lower-deck scum. If it was up to me, I'd boot every last one of them out of here, load of time-wasters... Ow! Damn wound."

traits.locale_text: "İğrenç. Alt güvertenin pislikleri yüzünden koridorlarda nefes alınmıyor. Elimde olsa hepsini buradan atardım, hepsi zaman kaybı... Of! Lanet yara."

languages.text: “真是令人作呕。走廊里全是下层甲板贱民的臭味，根本没法呼吸。要是能按我说的算，我早把这帮浪费时间的废物全踹出去了……哎哟！我这要命的伤口。”
languages.original_text: "Disgusting. Can't breathe in the corridors because of lower-deck scum. If it was up to me, I'd boot every last one of them out of here, load of time-wasters... Ow! Damn wound."

traits.locale_text: “真是令人作呕。走廊里全是下层甲板贱民的臭味，根本没法呼吸。要是能按我说的算，我早把这帮浪费时间的废物全踹出去了……哎哟！我这要命的伤口。”

languages.text: "Widerlich. Man kann in den Gängen angesichts dieses Unterdeck-Gesindels kaum atmen. Ginge es nach mir, würde ich sie alle rauswerfen, diese elenden Zeitverschwender ... Au! Verdammte Wunde."
languages.original_text: "Disgusting. Can't breathe in the corridors because of lower-deck scum. If it was up to me, I'd boot every last one of them out of here, load of time-wasters... Ow! Damn wound."

traits.locale_text: "Widerlich. Man kann in den Gängen angesichts dieses Unterdeck-Gesindels kaum atmen. Ginge es nach mir, würde ich sie alle rauswerfen, diese elenden Zeitverschwender ... Au! Verdammte Wunde."

languages.text: « C'est répugnant. L’air est devenu irrespirable dans les couloirs à cause de toute cette racaille des ponts inférieurs. Si ça ne tenait qu'à moi, j'expulserais tous ces bons à rien d'ici, et fissa… Aïe ! Maudite blessure. »
languages.original_text: "Disgusting. Can't breathe in the corridors because of lower-deck scum. If it was up to me, I'd boot every last one of them out of here, load of time-wasters... Ow! Damn wound."

traits.locale_text: « C'est répugnant. L’air est devenu irrespirable dans les couloirs à cause de toute cette racaille des ponts inférieurs. Si ça ne tenait qu'à moi, j'expulserais tous ces bons à rien d'ici, et fissa… Aïe ! Maudite blessure. »

languages.text: «Qué asco. No puedo respirar en los pasillos por la escoria de las cubiertas inferiores. Si de mi dependiera, los expulsaría a todos. Menuda pérdida de tiempo... ¡Ay! Maldita herida».
languages.original_text: "Disgusting. Can't breathe in the corridors because of lower-deck scum. If it was up to me, I'd boot every last one of them out of here, load of time-wasters... Ow! Damn wound."

traits.locale_text: «Qué asco. No puedo respirar en los pasillos por la escoria de las cubiertas inferiores. Si de mi dependiera, los expulsaría a todos. Menuda pérdida de tiempo... ¡Ay! Maldita herida».
